Compliance.description: SARB PA, FSCA FSP; solid regulatory standing; Net Zero commitment; responsible finance policies.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.67/5; app reviews moderate; net promoter split.

Product Value.description: Greenbacks rewards; Savvy accounts; Pocket account; fees competitive to Big 4.

Innovation.description: Nedbank Money app, PayShap, Mastercard, digital account opening, API banking.

Customer Support.description: Call centre, branches, in-app chat; HelloPeter score shows resolution gaps.

Accessibility & Security.description: Nationwide; POPIA; some fraud incidents; app security features; network outages noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Savvy from R69/mo; Savvy Plus R189; Private Wealth R395
